command: RUN_MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF=1 MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF_SEQ=17 MULTICHIP_DECODER_PREFILL_REPEATS=1 MULTICHIP_DECODER_TRACE_REPLAYS=1 python -m tracy -r -p --check-exit-code -o <logs>/final_short_profile -m pytest -q <test>::test_multichip_decoder_perf
purpose: Final-default capture after selecting the M<=32 L1 sparse-output prefill branch.
retention: Duplicate Tracy host/device intermediates were removed after report generation; the canonical op CSV, compact tables, summaries, PNGs, test log, JUnit, and hashes remain.

tt_perf_report.ep_activity_source: profile_ep_activity_layer{12,13}_seq17.json, exact profiler input seed and topology
tt_perf_report.modeling_policy: Decode is one token, so layer 12 uses the measured critical-rank maximum K=3 and layer 13 K=2. Prefill has token- and rank-varying EP activity that the scalar --active-experts option cannot represent; prefill tables omit sparse DRAM/FLOP modeling and use the exact activity JSON as the manual control.
